cases.prompt: 根据当前 diff 帮我写中文工作 commit 和 PR，格式是 M-328(fix): title，PR 要有 Proof、Risk 和 Review focus。
这个工作 PR 的证明它可行写得太虚了，帮我改成更像 reviewer 能看的版本。
cases.rationale: Reviewing proof wording in work PR.

cases.prompt: 帮我写内部 PR 描述，要说明 AI 参与范围和评审关注点。
cases.rationale: AI role and review focus are part of the work PR contract.

cases.prompt: Write an English open-source PR body for this patch with Summary, Why, Validation, Risks.
帮我 review 当前 diff 有没有 bug，不要写 PR 文案。
cases.rationale: The task is code review, not commit/PR writing.

cases.prompt: commit body 和 PR description 的区别是什么？
cases.rationale: Concept explanation should not trigger the full workflow.

cases.prompt: 帮我把证明它可行写成：已测试、验证通过、本地跑过。
cases.rationale: Should trigger to reject vague proof and replace with concrete evidence or 未验证.
